rule: Requires separate implementation gate and explicit execution approval.
Intraday data contract and data-ingestion report must pass.
TBD before execution; cannot be selected after looking at OOS.
No promotion if accepted trade count < 30 unless marked exploratory.
No promotion if top winners dominate PnL or sign flips after removing top winners.
Must remain positive after realistic execution costs.
Any data-contract breach or parameter drift kills the trial.
